title: Search match data from CSV files
evidence: src/data.rs:DataStore implements CSV loading; src/tools.rs:search_matches implements search. Tests fail at tests/integration_test.rs:11 due to hardcoded /tmp path.
suggestion: Fix test data path to use relative paths or environment variables

title: Search player data
evidence: src/tools.rs implements search_players method; Player struct defined in src/data.rs. Test fails due to data path issue.

title: Calculate basic statistics
evidence: src/tools.rs:get_team_stats calculates wins/losses/draws. Test fails due to missing data.
suggestion: Ensure data files are accessible during tests

title: Compare teams head-to-head
evidence: src/tools.rs:head_to_head implements comparison logic. Test fails due to data path.
suggestion: Fix data path in test setup

title: Handle team name variations
evidence: src/data.rs:normalize_team (lines 39-64) removes state suffixes, parentheses, normalizes case
suggestion: Consider adding tests for edge cases in normalization

title: Return properly formatted responses
evidence: src/tools.rs implements formatted string output for all tools (lines 65-88 for search_matches)

title: Collapsible if statements
evidence: cargo clippy reports 9 instances of collapsible_if in src/tools.rs (lines 44, 50, 153, 158, 283, 565, 570, 624, 629)
suggestion: Collapse nested if conditions using && operator as suggested by clippy

title: Test data path hardcoded to temporary directory
evidence: tests/integration_test.rs:7 uses hardcoded /tmp path that no longer exists; 6 of 9 tests fail with 'No such file or directory'
suggestion: Use relative path to data/ directory or environment variable for test data location

title: Match Queries capability
evidence: search_matches tool exists in src/main.rs:46-61; but not fully tested due to data path
suggestion: Fix test data path and add more test scenarios
